languages.original_text: "Heresy. How often was that most grievous accusation levelled at Nuncius and me. More often than not, it is merely a tool used by those in power to condemn everything they do not understand, or simply do not want to see. Your methods are often unconventional, and that rankles those who believe you are infringing on the established order of things. But isn't that why the Rogue Trader is granted such staggering powers, so that they might conquer those domains that someone who forever toes the line cannot? We live in truly absurd times."

languages.text: "Ересь. Как часто в наш с Нунциусом адрес звучало это весьма серьезное обвинение. Чаще всего оно — лишь орудие, которым власть имущие выносят приговор всему, чего не понимают или попросту не желают видеть. Ваши методы зачастую неконвенциональны и это не нравится тем, кто считает, что вы покушаетесь на установленный порядок вещей. Но разве не затем Вольному Торговцу даны баснословные полномочия, чтобы обуздывать те владения, которые не мог бы покорить человек никогда не выходящий за рамки? Мы живем с вами в воистину абсурдные времена".

languages.text: «Herejía. La de veces que Nuncius y yo hemos tenido que oír esa grave acusación. En la mayoría de los casos, es solo una herramienta que utilizan los poderosos para condenar todo lo que no entienden o les resulta desagradable. Sus métodos tienden a evitar lo convencional, y eso choca con quienes creen que está incumpliendo el orden establecido. ¿Acaso no es ese el motivo de que los Comerciantes Independientes posean tantísimo poder, para conquistar los dominios que quienes se limitan no pueden obtener? Vivimos en tiempos verdaderamente absurdos».
languages.original_text: "Heresy. How often was that most grievous accusation levelled at Nuncius and me. Vivimos en tiempos verdaderamente absurdos».

languages.text: “异端。这个最严重的罪名，已经不知有多少次被扣在我和努恩修斯身上了。大多数情况下，这不过是当权者的话柄，用来谴责一切他们无法理解、或者干脆不想看到的东西。您的做法常常不循常规，这会惹恼那些觉得您破坏现有秩序的人。但行商浪人之所以被授予如此惊人的权力，不正是为了征服那些循规蹈矩之人永远无法触及的领域吗？这个世道真是荒唐透顶。”
languages.original_text: "Heresy. How often was that most grievous accusation levelled at Nuncius and me. More often than not, it is merely a tool used by those in power to condemn everything they do not understand, or simply do not want to see. Your methods are often unconventional, and that rankles those who believe you are infringing on the established order of things. But isn't that why the Rogue Trader is granted such staggering powers, so that they might conquer those domains that someone who forever toes the line cannot? We live in truly absurd times."

traits.locale_text: “异端。这个最严重的罪名，已经不知有多少次被扣在我和努恩修斯身上了。大多数情况下，这不过是当权者的话柄，用来谴责一切他们无法理解、或者干脆不想看到的东西。您的做法常常不循常规，这会惹恼那些觉得您破坏现有秩序的人。但行商浪人之所以被授予如此惊人的权力，不正是为了征服那些循规蹈矩之人永远无法触及的领域吗？这个世道真是荒唐透顶。”

languages.text: « Ah, l'hérésie. Combien de fois cette terrible accusation a-t-elle été lancée à notre encontre, à Nuncius et moi ? Le plus souvent, ce n'est rien de plus qu'un outil utilisé par les puissants pour condamner ce qu'ils ne comprennent pas, ou plus simplement ce qu'ils refusent de voir. Vos méthodes sont rarement conventionnelles, ce qui déplaît fortement à ceux qui estiment que vous déstabilisez l'ordre établi. Mais n'est-ce pas justement pour cela que les libres-marchands reçoivent un tel pouvoir, pour qu'ils puissent conquérir les domaines inaccessibles à ceux refusant de franchir certaines limites ? Nous vivons décidément une époque absurde. »
languages.original_text: "Heresy. How often was that most grievous accusation levelled at Nuncius and me. More often than not, it is merely a tool used by those in power to condemn everything they do not understand, or simply do not want to see. Your methods are often unconventional, and that rankles those who believe you are infringing on the established order of things. But isn't that why the Rogue Trader is granted such staggering powers, so that they might conquer those domains that someone who forever toes the line cannot? We live in truly absurd times."

Nous vivons décidément une époque absurde. »

languages.text: "Ketzerei. Wie oft waren Nuncius und ich schon mit dieser abscheulichen Anschuldigung konfrontiert. Mittlerweile ist sie meist nur ein Werkzeug, mit dem die Mächtigen alles verdammen, was sie nicht verstehen oder schlicht nicht sehen wollen. Eure Methoden sind oft unkonventionell, und das nagt an den Leuten, die glauben, Ihr würdet die etablierte Ordnung der Dinge verletzen. Aber hat {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} nicht genau deshalb eine so große Macht, damit {mf|er|sie} all die Reiche erobern kann, die ein ewiger Jasager niemals erreicht? Wir leben wirklich in absurden Zeiten."
languages.original_text: "Heresy. How often was that most grievous accusation levelled at Nuncius and me. More often than not, it is merely a tool used by those in power to condemn everything they do not understand, or simply do not want to see. languages.text: 「異端。ヌンシウスと私は、意味を失って久しいその言葉をよく耳にした。多くの場合、この言葉は権力者が自分の理解できないもの、あるいは単に見たくないものを非難するために使う道具にすぎない。あなたのやり方はしばしば型破りで、それが既成の秩序を侵害していると考える人たちを怒らせる。しかし、だからこそローグ・トレーダーは、いつまでも一線を越えてはならない領域を征服するために、驚異的な力を与えられているのではないだろうか？私たちは本当に不条理な時代に生きている」。
languages.original_text: "Heresy. How often Nuncius and I heard that word, which had long since lost all meaning. More often than not, the word is merely a tool used by those in power to condemn everything they do not understand, or simply do not want to see. Your methods are often unconventional, and that rankles those who believe you are infringing on the established order of things. But isn't that why the Rogue Trader is granted such staggering powers, so that they might conquer those domains that someone who forever toes the line cannot? We live in truly absurd times."

languages.text: "Kâfirlik. Bu ağır suçlama, Nuncius'a ve bana sıklıkla yöneltildi. Çoğu zaman iktidardakilerin anlamadıkları veya basitçe görmek istemedikleri her şeyi kınamak için kullandıkları bir araçtan ibarettir. Yöntemleriniz genellikle alışılmadık ve bu, kurulu düzeni ihlal ettiğinize inananları rahatsız ediyor. Fakat Hür Tacir'e, asla yoldan şaşmayan birinin fethedemeyeceği diyarları fethetmesi için böylesine şaşırtıcı güçler verilmesinin nedeni bu değil mi? Gerçekten absürt zamanlarda yaşıyoruz."
languages.original_text: "Heresy. How often was that most grievous accusation levelled at Nuncius and me. More often than not, it is merely a tool used by those in power to condemn everything they do not understand, or simply do not want to see. But isn't that why the Rogue Trader is granted such staggering powers, so that they might conquer those domains that someone who forever toes the line cannot? We live in truly absurd times."
